name: Pastel Marshmallows
recipeIngredient: 1 package (3 oz) any fruit flavor Jell-O
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve Jell-O in boiling water in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Stir in sugar until dissolved (do not boil).
3. Blend in corn syrup.
4. Chill until slightly thickened.
5. Line an 8-inch square pan with wax paper and grease with butter or margarine.
6. Beat the gelatin mixture at highest speed of electric mixer until soft peaks form, about 5 minutes.
7. Pour into pan and let stand in refrigerator overnight.
8. Place mixture on a board heavily coated with confectioners' sugar.
9. To remove wax paper, dampen surface and let stand a few minutes; then peel off paper.
10. Dust top with sugar.
11. Cut into 1-inch squares.
12. Roll cut edges in sugar.
Makes about 6 dozen.
